rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 763-767 And 769-771 Tehama Street, San Francisco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 5, 2014, line 1. OTHER E. LYNN SCHOENMANN's Motion For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 763-767 And 769-771 Tehama Street, San Francisco Continued to December 5, 2014 pending the resolution of appeal. If appeal is resolved earlier moving party may appear ex-parte to advance the hearing date. If appeal is not resolved by December 1, 2014, moving party shall advise the Court. = (501/MJM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 5, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF ADVANCE INHERITANCE, INC.'s Motion For Order Of Property Not A Dwelling Place For Judgment Debtor Continued to October 3, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than September 12, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/MJM)

DEFENDANTs ANDREW LINTON, MARIANA CERVELLEIRA, CHRISTOPHER JERNBERG and KLAUDIA CASANOVA's Motion For Release Of Funds And Access To Premises OFF CALENDAR. rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 5, 2014, line 9. PLAINTIFF SAM HUNT's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Stipulated Judgment DENIED. Defendant has substantially complied with the terms of the Settlement Agreement. = (501/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: TRUE GOSPEL BAPTIST CHURCH VS. YVONNE THOMAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 5, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANT YVONNE THOMAS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED, subject to opposition. April 24, 2014 purported service of Summons and Complaint is quashed. Defendant has established Summons was never served. No opposition filed. = (501/MJM)
